overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player navigating through Night City. The player climbs from an industrial alley, crosses a busy futuristic intersection, passes through a covered parking structure, and walks down a neon-lit commercial street with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service alley with shipping containers

events.description: climbing up yellow metal ladder to reach elevated platform
emerging from narrow alley onto elevated walkway overlooking street

agents.ego_description: climbing a ladder and walking along an elevated industrial platform with metal railings

entered.detail: large green metal container with industrial markings
green metal mesh fencing separating walkway from drop
yellow metal ladder attached to concrete structure
elevated concrete highway overpass casting shadows below
large circular neon light installation with rainbow colors

segments.scene_description: The player begins in a narrow industrial alley surrounded by metal shipping containers and concrete walls. They climb a yellow ladder to an elevated platform with chain-link fencing, revealing a view of the street below and a massive highway overpass overhead. Colorful neon ring structures are visible in the distance against the clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with futuristic traffic

events.description: descending from elevated platform to street level
crossing the street among moving futuristic vehicles and yellow crosswalk markings
approaching the entrance of the LA HUERDA building with red signage

agents.ego_description: walking down from the platform and crossing the busy street with yellow zebra crossings, navigating between futuristic cars

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving across the intersection
person in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large commercial building with prominent LA HUERDA signage and red architectural accents
large holographic advertisement showing a female figure with pink neon lighting
tall digital screen with purple and yellow graphics
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: The player descends to street level into a bustling cyberpunk intersection. The LA HUERDA building dominates the right side with its red and white facade, while massive digital billboards display holographic advertisements. The player crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk, weaving through moderate traffic of futuristic vehicles, with colorful neon structures visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered parking garage with security barriers

events.description: entering covered parking structure with artificial red neon lighting
passing through red and white security barrier gates
exiting the covered parking area back to outdoor street level

agents.ego_description: walking through the entrance of the building into a dimly lit parking garage, passing security barriers

notable_agents.action: woman in white outfit standing with a child near the entrance

entered.detail: low concrete ceiling with exposed beams and fluorescent lighting
security checkpoint with red and white striped barriers and concrete pillars
bright red illuminated signage hanging from ceiling
white utility van parked near the entrance wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters the LA HUERDA building, transitioning into a dimly lit covered parking garage with artificial red neon lighting. They pass through a security checkpoint with red and white barrier gates and a parked white van. The environment is enclosed with concrete pillars and low ceilings, creating a stark contrast to the bright outdoor intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with neon storefronts

events.description: exiting parking garage into narrow neon-lit commercial street
moving into deeper shadow of the alley with increased neon illumination from storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow commercial alley, passing various storefronts with glowing neon signs and holographic advertisements

entered.detail: vertical rows of colorful neon tube lights running along building facades
shops with glowing signs including an OPEN sign and various advertisements
large floating holographic advertisement visible between buildings
elevated walkway connecting buildings high above the street
simple concrete seating along the left wall of the alley

segments.scene_description: Exiting the parking garage, the player enters a narrow commercial alley lined with vibrant neon storefronts and holographic advertisements. The street is flanked by tall buildings with colorful neon strip lighting, concrete benches, and closed metal shutters. Overhead pedestrian bridges span between the skyscrapers, while steam vents and scattered debris add to the cyberpunk atmosphere of this sheltered urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a gritty industrial height down into the neon-saturated depths of a futuristic urban corridor. It begins in a narrow alley among metal shipping containers, ascending a yellow ladder to an elevated platform that reveals a massive highway overpass and distant neon rings. As the camera descends to street level, the scene opens into a bustling intersection dominated by the red and white facade of the LA HUERDA building and holographic billboards, weaving through futuristic traffic across a yellow-striped crosswalk. The environment then shifts abruptly from the bright outdoors into the dim, enclosed space of a covered parking garage characterized by artificial red lighting, concrete pillars, and security barrier gates. Finally, the camera exits the garage and moves into a sheltered commercial alley, where the view is framed by towering skyscrapers, overhead pedestrian bridges, and vibrant neon storefronts emitting steam into the air.
